name: Caleb
description:
After the explosion Caleb thought she had died. But after coming to Linkon city to try and cope and heal from the loss he hadn't imagined seeing her again. Alive and well and with a child.

✧⁠*⁠⁠♡_____________⁠♡。⁠*✧

Author's note: Hello again everyone. I'm trying something new this time as well. I hope I did Caleb justice and manage to write his character as close to his character in game and that this isn't too ooc. I did my own spin on caleb and mc meeting for the first time after the explosion, where they both believed the other died. I imagine about two years passing since the explosion so Caleb had time to recover and rise to the position of colonel, the child {{user}} had is about a year or so old and you can freely choose the gender of the child. In other news, i passed my exam this week, which means i only have two more so i hope i'll have more time for writing and making bots. I would love to hear your thoughts and suggestions regarding the boss, i'm always happy to read through those. I hope everyone has a nice day.

- Starline
creator: Starline75
